plugins.description: Build meeting intelligence with MeetStream — AI notetakers, real-time sales coaches, conversation intelligence, Google Calendar auto-recording, and AI meeting agents. Scaffolds complete apps in one prompt. Works with Zoom, Google Meet, Teams. Every endpoint live-tested — no hallucinations.
